test_cases.title: Verify ping works during standard PvP combat
test_cases.precondition: Two players are matched successfully and the PvP match is active.
steps: Use or trigger ping during normal combat.
Observe gameplay response for both players.
Verify UI and match state update correctly.
test_cases.expected_result: ping should work correctly in standard PvP combat.

test_cases.title: Verify ping handles disconnects or lag correctly
test_cases.precondition: A PvP match is active and network conditions can be varied.
steps: Simulate lag, packet delay, or a temporary disconnect.
Observe recovery behavior after the connection changes.
test_cases.expected_result: ping should recover gracefully from lag or disconnect conditions.

test_cases.title: Verify ping remains fair for both players
test_cases.precondition: A balanced PvP match is active between two valid players.
steps: Use ping repeatedly from both player perspectives.
Compare results, timing, and feedback on both sides.
Check whether one player gets an unfair advantage.
test_cases.expected_result: ping should behave fairly and consistently for all players.
